'''Yarbolk Yemm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] reporter for the [[TriNebulon News/Legends|''TriNebulon News'']] and was investigating [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]].
